items.name_en: Hobo Bag 👛 Chanel 24P hobo love it/❤️ Small cowhide, shoulder strap length is satisfying, and it's light with a surprisingly large capacity. It looks small but holds a lot [wink]. Capacity is more than double that of the heart-shaped clasp square [wow]. The hobo leather is shiny.

Size: 18 base x 23 top x 11.5 H x 5cm
Model: cc1018

items.name_en: 25C New Spring Collection Exquisite Small Chain Clutch 👜 Grained calfskin with gold metal, handle has a small logo, and a curved seam on the leather makes the bag look more structured. The grained leather is also scratch-resistant. The chain is detachable and can be carried by hand; the capacity is also suitable. Unique design and practicality make it my recent favorite.

items.name_en: 25C Lunch Box Bag
items.name_cn:
25C Lunch Box Bag
The 19 was really recalled! Haven't seen a 6 yet. The lunch box is quite nice; if you didn't have a similar style before, you could consider getting one (detachable shoulder strap, which is good). The backpack in my impression is a replica, it came out a long time ago. It is light and good-looking to wear, and the key is that it fits the back very well.
Size: 21.5-19-6
Model: cc1015

items.name_en: OHANEL 🚩🚩🚩 25P New Rhombus Tote Bag Shopping Bag 🧺✨ Vintage gold hardware, double C, logo, plus the basket bag shape, the retro flavor comes out immediately. Super large space to meet all your capacity needs. Comes with a handle and a long hardware chain ⛓ Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or carried by hand. Soft and delicate suede, the texture is super great and feels good! 36 long x 11.5 wide x 32 high

Soft and delicate calfskin, excellent texture and great feel!

items.name_en: OHANEL 🔮🔮🔮 The handsome best-selling oversized airport bag is here 🆕. This bag is truly born for travel. The bag body is very light, a perfect travel companion 🚩🚩🚩. Buy one bag and everyone can use it, really too practical!! The bigger the airport bag, the cooler it looks. This supermodel large patent grainy leather rhombus pattern, paired with eye-catching vintage hardware embellishing the Cambon square plaque. Wear it and you have a stunning airport look. Size 43cm

items.name_en: Chanel 24s Denim Gradient
items.name_cn:
Chanel 24s Denim Gradient
Size: 10x20x7cm
The new 24s Denim series is a must-have. I love this Chanel denim style and couldn't wait to get it. It may seem like a picky color, but it will surprise you. Wearing it makes you the most unique and eye-catching fairy. Elegance and fashion are its synonyms. The gradient denim color, paired with a navy leather chain and vintage hardware, is hard not to love. Available in CF 20cm and 25cm sizes. The capacity is more than enough for shopping or dates. Having one for each of us and our besties is just beautiful. This is a super long-lasting bestseller you can carry for years.

items.name_en: Chanel Vintage Medium Straw Bag🍂
items.name_cn:
Chanel Vintage Medium Straw Bag🍂
Size: 20*36*9cm
Grandma 👵 loves the wheat ear 🌾 element, often seen on vintage jewelry 💍. At the 2010 Spring/Summer show, Karl Lagerfeld recreated a farm 👩‍🌾 scene at the Grand Palais. This woven bag 🍃 is from this series. Soft and chewy, feels great, like lying in a barn 🌾 pile 😌. Only a relaxed seaside vacation 🏖️ matches a woven bag. The sea breeze 🌊 in early autumn is cozy and gentle, just like this charming woven bag 👝
